steps.description: Rust integration test for Lock flow
steps.command: cd src/api/api && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test --test sequence_e2e_test seq1_lock -- --nocapture
steps.expected: Test output confirms: Lock record created in DB, SR_0 computed as SHA3-256("QS_LOCK_V1" || chain_id || asset || amount || dest_addr || expiry || nonce || pk_dilithium), and L1 lockWithSR0 transaction submitted. Test must exit with code 0 and must not print any SKIP, fallback, or hardcoded-address warning.

steps.description: Playwright integration spec for Consumer Lock
steps.command: cd src/frontend/web && npx playwright test e2e/integration/lock.integration.spec.ts --reporter=json
steps.expected: All Playwright test cases in lock.integration.spec.ts pass (status: 'passed' in JSON reporter output). UI lock creation flow reaches a success state and a corresponding DB row is observable. Exit code must be 0.

steps.description: Verify lock row was created during this run window, pk_dilithium populated, and L1 submission was attempted
steps.command: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -t -A -c "SELECT lock_id, status, length(pk_dilithium), l1_tx_hash IS NOT NULL AS l1_submitted FROM locks WHERE created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;"
steps.expected: Exactly one row is returned from within the last 5 minutes. The status column must be one of {pending, locked, confirmed}. The pk_dilithium length must equal exactly 1952 bytes. The l1_submitted column must be t when the L1 Vault is reachable. A result with zero rows, pk_dilithium length != 1952, or l1_submitted=f (when L1 is reachable) is a hard failure.

steps.description: Verify totalLocked increased on Sepolia Vault
steps.expected: The returned uint256 value must be strictly greater than 0 wei, confirming at least one Lock deposit has been recorded by the L1 Vault contract. A return value of 0 is a hard failure.

acceptance_criteria: Backend integration test (seq1_lock) exits with code 0 and output confirms SR_0 computation and L1 lockWithSR0 submission — no skips or fallbacks
Playwright lock.integration.spec.ts exits with code 0 and all test cases report status: 'passed' in JSON output
A locks row exists in the DB created within the last 5 minutes with status in {pending, locked, confirmed}, pk_dilithium length exactly equal to 1952 bytes, and l1_tx_hash IS NOT NULL
Sepolia Vault totalLocked() returns a value strictly greater than 0 wei
No silent fallback or hardcoded address appears anywhere in the execution trace across all layers
